basic_details.job_title: MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak (MDU Rohtak) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with M.A. in English with NET/JRF/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualification can directly attend the interview on 27-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: M.A. in English with a minimum of 55% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST/PwD candidates) along with NET/JRF/M.Phil./Ph.D.

MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MDU Rohtak Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MDU Rohtak Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being advertised by MDU Rohtak?
faq.answer: Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak is recruiting for the post of Research Assistant. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position at MDU Rohtak.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A. in English with a minimum of 55% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST/PwD) and also have cleared NET/JRF or hold an M.Phil./Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being done through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Research Assistant post is scheduled for 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the MDU Rohtak located?
faq.answer: Maharshi Dayanand University is located in Rohtak, Haryana.
